description_long: This helmet features a sculpted design resembling the head of an ankylosaurus dinosaur, with a textured green surface and prominent beige bony protrusions along the top and sides. The helmet's face area is detailed with blue, forward-facing eyes and a snout-like structure, giving it a lifelike, expressive appearance. The lower section is encased in a glossy, deep red shell with black and yellow accents, suggesting a reinforced, high-tech collar or base. The red shell appears smooth and protective, wrapping securely around the base of the dinosaur head. The overall construction combines organic and synthetic elements, blending prehistoric motifs with modern, urban protective gear. The helmet is visually striking and would stand out in any urban environment due to its unique, character-inspired design.
description: A dinosaur-themed helmet with a textured green head, beige bony spikes, blue eyes, and a glossy red and black reinforced base.
description_view_0: Front view shows the dinosaur face with blue eyes, snout, and symmetrical beige spikes, with the red and black base visible below.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the dinosaur head, the arrangement of spikes, and the curvature of the red shell around the neck.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the helmet, focusing on the row of beige spikes and the smooth, glossy red shell encircling the base.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the dinosaur's profile, spike placement, and the integration of the red and black base.
attribute_graphic_design: The helmet features a sculpted dinosaur motif with a textured green surface, beige spikes, and a glossy red and black base with yellow accents; no additional graphics or text are present.
